calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Dec-13-2018 Vacated

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And For Entry Of Consent Judgment As To Defendant Kmart Corporation
Off Calendar Jun-06-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
Plaintiff Ecological Rights Foundation's motion to approve Proposition 65 settlement with defendant Kmart Corporation is granted. No opposition filed and the settlement complies with the requirements for Proposition 65 settlements. Order and judgment signed. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR # 8600 =302/hk
